log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kobold — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Kobold — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Kobold — Armored Tank.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:12+3=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Kobold — Armored Tank.
→ Kobold — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:1+7=8 vs DC 11] FAIL! 3 radiant damage. HP: 56/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+4=21 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Kobold — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Kobold — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Kobold — Armored Tank.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:1+3=4 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Kobold — Armored Tank.
→ Kobold — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:15+7=22 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Kobold — Armored Tank.

ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Kobold — Armored Tank.
